zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Audley於大約1342年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親James Audley 2nd Baron Audley31歲，母親Isabel le Strange19歲。她於1360年與Fulk Fitzwarin VIII在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾姆德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1407年享年66歲，埋葬在英國戴文塔福斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Audley于大约1342年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲James Audley 2nd Baron Audley31岁，母亲Isabel le Strange19岁。她于1360年与Fulk Fitzwarin VIII在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾姆德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1407年享年66岁，埋葬在英国戴文塔福斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Audley was born about 1342, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, was 31 and her mother, Isabel le Strange, was 19. She married Fulk Fitzwarin VIII in 1360, in Edgmond, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1407, at the age of 66, and was buried in Tawstock, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Audley est née environ 1342, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel le Strange, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Fulk Fitzwarin VIII en 1360, à Edgmond, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1407, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Tawstock, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Audley um 1342 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Audley 2nd Baron Audley 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel le Strange 19. Sie hat 1360 in Edgmond, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Fulk Fitzwarin VIII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1407 im Alter von 66 Jahren und wurde in Tawstock, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Audley è nata il circa 1342 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel le Strange, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Fulk Fitzwarin VIII nel 1360, nel Edgmond, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1407, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Tawstock, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Audleyが約1342年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父James Audley 2nd Baron Audleyは31歳，母Isabel le Strangeは19歳であった。1360年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアエドグモンドでFulk Fitzwarin VIIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1407年に66歳で死去し，イギリスデボンタウストックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Audley(이)가 대략 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Audley 2nd Baron Audley(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel le Strange(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 에지몽에서 Fulk Fitzwarin VIII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 타w스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Audley nasceu aproximadamente 1342, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel le Strange, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulk Fitzwarin VIII em 1360, em Edgmond, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1407, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Audley родилась около 1342 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Audley 2nd Baron Audley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel le Strange, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk Fitzwarin VIII в 1360 г. в местности эджмонд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1407 г. в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности тавстокк, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Audley nació aproximadamente 1342, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Audley 2nd Baron Audley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel le Strange, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Fulk Fitzwarin VIII en 1360, en Edgmond, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1407, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra.
